name: Chicken Monterey
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Monterey Jack cheese or Cheddar, grated
2 tablespoons seasoned or plain dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken to 1/4 inch thickness.
2. Season the inside of the chicken with salt, pepper, parsley, and tarragon.
3. Place cheese in the center and fold the chicken around it.
4. Roll the chicken in flour, dip into egg, then roll in bread crumbs.
5. Place the chicken on a plate, seam side down, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
6. In a skillet, saute the chicken in butter and oil until golden.
7. Place the chicken in a small shallow baking dish.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 15 minutes or until juices run clear.
